svg.text: • 15. 3Sum / 16. 3Sum Closest / 18. 4Sum — fix one (or two), two-pointer the rest
• 11. Container With Most Water — area maximization, move shorter wall inward
• 42. Trapping Rain Water — bound by min(maxLeft, maxRight); advance smaller side
• 125. Valid Palindrome / 680. Valid Palindrome II — mirror check with skip option
• 75. Sort Colors — Dutch national flag, three pointers (low / mid / high)
• 344. Reverse String / 345. Reverse Vowels — pure swap pattern
• 26. Remove Duplicates from Sorted Array — slow = next write index
• 27. Remove Element — same skeleton, predicate-based filter
• 283. Move Zeroes — write non-zeroes forward, zero-fill the tail
• 88. Merge Sorted Array — write from the back to avoid in-place clobber
• 905. Sort Array by Parity / 922. By Parity II — partition by predicate
Pattern recognition: sorted input + pair predicate, or in-place rewrite — reach for two-pointer.
